items.title: Why Iran should not count on allies Russia and China to come to its aid
items.description: Iran's closest allies, Russia and China, have not offered material support to it, exposing the hard limits of its "strategic" partnerships.

items.title: As Trump declares inflation tamed, Iran conflict threatens new price pressures
items.description: The conflict involving Iran threatens another price spike that could undermine the president's central case for lower interest rates.

items.title: Iran conflict: Where things stand, global responses — and what comes next
items.description: The U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran is extending into its third day with each side pledging escalation.

items.title: Are Jack Dorsey's aggressive job cuts the start of an AI jobs apocalypse? Economists weigh in
items.description: Economists question whether such moves signal a broader shift in the labor market or simply reflect company-specific adjustments.

items.title: Core wholesale prices rose 0.8% in January, much more than expected
items.description: The core producer price index increased a seasonally adjusted 0.8%, more than the 0.6% gain in December.
